cross_platform_context.key_insights: The live-chat hardening session completed successfully on branch feat/ui-workflow-audit: WS auth, ownership checks, room tracking, Redis cross-instance exclusion, REST transfer fallback, and REST/WS response consistency were all hardened. Final verification passed with 70 backend live-chat tests and a successful frontend production build. The state artifacts now point future agents at project-log-md/codeX/session-summary-20260318-2142.md for the full handoff.

task_tracking.note: TASK_LOG.md is APPEND-ONLY. SESSION_INDEX.md maps tasks to summaries.
